title: Entity Context Perspective — Immutable
description: Schema for boardroom/mind/{agent_id}/Manas/context/{entity}.jsonld. The context perspective holds the agent's immutable, legend-derived knowledge about a shared entity (company or product). It encodes what this legend natively understands about the entity — never updated at runtime.

@context.description: JSON-LD context URI for the entity type

@id.description: Entity identifier, e.g. asi:saga or bi:product:core

@type.description: Entity type, e.g. SagaEntity or SoftwareProduct

agent_perspective.description: Agent identifier this perspective belongs to, e.g. agent:ceo

legend.description: Legend name for this agent, e.g. Steve Jobs

domain_knowledge.description: Entity-specific domain knowledge from the legend's perspective

persona.description: How this agent presents itself when engaging with this entity

language.description: Language and communication style applied to this entity
